steps.title: Find the general claim
steps.content: The goal is to make a generalization about circumnavigations. The notes provide both a broad pattern, that most include stops on land, and two examples showing nonstop circumnavigations can occur.

steps.title: Reject specific details
steps.content: A names the sailors and boats without generalizing. B only defines circumnavigation. C mentions two individual journeys, but it does not state a broader pattern about circumnavigations as a category. The answer is D.
